zh.lifeSummary: 當William H. Carter Sr於1510年出生在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓時，他的父親Thomas Croxton Carter15歲，母親Emily Anscell27歲。他於1540年與Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield在英國英格蘭貝德福爾巴福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾肯普斯頓享年59歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾肯普斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William H. Carter Sr于1510年出生在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas Croxton Carter15岁，母亲Emily Anscell27岁。他于1540年与Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield在英国英格兰貝德福爾巴福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年在英国英格兰貝德福爾肯普斯頓享年59岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾肯普斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When William H. Carter Sr was born in 1510, in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Croxton Carter, was 15 and his mother, Emily Anscell, was 27. He married Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield in 1540, in Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1569, in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William H. Carter Sr est né en 1510, à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Croxton Carter, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Emily Anscell, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield en 1540, à Barford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1569, à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Kempston, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William H. Carter Sr 1510 in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Croxton Carter 15 und seine Mutter Emily Anscell 27. Er hat 1540 in Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1569 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kempston, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William H. Carter Sr è nato il nel 1510 nel Kempston, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Croxton Carter, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Emily Anscell, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield nel 1540, nel Barford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1569, nel Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Kempston, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William H. Carter Srが1510年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Croxton Carterは15歳，母Emily Anscellは27歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアバーフォードでElizabeth Catherine Cranfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1569年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンで59歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアケンプストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William H. Carter Sr(이)가 1510년 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Croxton Carter(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Emily Anscell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 바퍼드에서 Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 케프스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William H. Carter Sr nasceu em 1510, em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Croxton Carter, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Emily Anscell, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield em 1540, em Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1569, em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William H. Carter Sr родился в 1510 г. в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Croxton Carter было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Emily Anscell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield в 1540 г. в местности барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1569 г. в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности кемпстон, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William H. Carter Sr nació en 1510, en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Croxton Carter, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Emily Anscell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Catherine Cranfield en 1540, en Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1569, en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Kempston, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
